title: Human Takeover
description: Channel v1 human takeover contract for channel conversations where AI must pause and a human owner handles the case.
$comment: Sources: PACK-05 and PACK-06 require human takeover for complaints, legal/media, payment dispute, privacy deletion, quality/adverse event, low confidence, or AI handoff-required cases. TODO: source snippets do not expose a fully locked human takeover state enum; enum contains conservative source-backed states.

reason.description: Reason for takeover. TODO: define official reason taxonomy.

owner_team.description: Team or owner responsible for takeover.

ai_paused.description: Whether AI responses are paused for this context.

return_to_ai_allowed.description: Whether policy allows returning the conversation to AI.
